title: The Road to Sabaody: Turning Point

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ehhhhhhh, why did you die, big brother!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Why'd you get in my way?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Don't make trouble for us, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: you... huh...? weren't you a kid?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Are you right in the head!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'll take this guy. He got shot.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: I took a peek at the town.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I saw that, let's buy one!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: We'll have to try them out first.
